chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No. S- 643/2025. Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For Hearing of Bail Application. 1. For orders on office objection at Flag ‘A’. 2. For hearing of bail application. O R D E R. 29.08.2025. Mr. Muhammad Junaid Akram, Advocate for Applicants. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G. Mehmood A. Khan J Through this order, I intend to dispose of post arrest bail application filed on behalf of applicants/accused Asad son of Muhammad Hassan and Shakeel son of Zamir Ahmed in crime No.81/2025, offence u/s 365-B, 452, 148, 149 PPC and 3 TIP registered at Police Station Baiji Shareef. Prior to this, post arrest bail filed on behalf of applicants/accused was turned down by learned Additional Sessions Judge-II/GBVC (Designated) Sukkur vide order dated 16.07.2025, hence he has filed instant bail application. 2. The details and particulars of the FIR are already available in the bail application and FIR, same could be gathered from the copy of FIR attached with such applications, hence, needs not to reproduce the same hereunder. 3. Learned counsel for applicants/accused contends by way of statement dated 26.08.2025 of alleged abductee Mst. Rabia recorded before this Court in C.P No. D-1277 of 2025 dated 19.08.2025 has been brought up wherein alleged abductee has specifically stated that she has gone with her 2 free will with Nadir Ali and having conducted marriage with him and living freely with him, as such case against applicants/accused require further enquiry and they are entitled for grant of bail 4. Learned Additional Prosecutor General conceded to the averments made by learned counsel for applicants/accused as well as the statement recorded by alleged abductee and did not oppose for grant of bail. 5.

D-1277 of 2025 dated 19.08.2025 has been brought up wherein alleged abductee has specifically stated that she has gone with her 2 free will with Nadir Ali and having conducted marriage with him and living freely with him, as such case against applicants/accused require further enquiry and they are entitled for grant of bail 4. Learned Additional Prosecutor General conceded to the averments made by learned counsel for applicants/accused as well as the statement recorded by alleged abductee and did not oppose for grant of bail. 5. Having heard learned counsel for applicants, learned Additional Prosecutor General and perused the record. 6. Since the alleged abductee Mst. Rabia appeared before the Court and on the directions of this Court, Investigating Officer recorded her statement in C.P No. D-1277 of 2025 wherein she has categorically stated that she on her own free will left her house and having conducted marriage with Nadir Ali and she is living freely with him and she has not stated any word against the applicants/accused in respect of her abdcution. Accordingly a case of further inquiry is found present and bail application is allowed. Applicants/accused Asad son of Muhammad Hassan and Shakeel son of Zamir Ahmed are granted bail subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs. 30,000/- (thirty thousand) each and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of trial Court. 7. The aforesaid bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Irfan/PS
